title: SIAHA DISTRICT TOURISM DESTINATION MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE AN ṬHUKHAWM
content:
650/2026-2027

Dated Siaha, May 21, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan DC Mini Conference Hall, Siahaah Tourism Destination Management Committee (TDMC) Siaha District an ṭhukhawm.

Vawiin ṭhutkhawm hi Siaha District Tourism Destination Management Committee Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte in a kaihruai a, member kal khawmte lawmna thu sawiin, Siaha district vanneihna chu mihringte siamchawp ni miah lo, khuanu siamsa hmunhma mawi tak tak a awm hi a ni, a ti. Chutiang ang hmunhma, chanchin ngaihnawm tâk tâk neite chu khualzinte hmuh theih tura thuziak tär te, sem chhuah mai theih tur lehkhabute (booklet) siam ṭhaa a hriat thu a sawi bawk.

Tunlaiah chuan hriselna hi mi tin ngaihpawimawh a nih tawh avangin khualzinte tlawh theih hmunhma kan neihah hian kea kalna tur leh lirthei kal theihna chin thliar a, chumi mila hma lâk ṭha a tih thu Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte chuan a sawiin, Siaha District chu hmun hla tak leh thlawhpawhna kawng pawh ṭha lo tak tia hriat ṭhin chu tun dinhmunah Mizorama Helicopter service ṭhatna bêr niin kar khatah Aizawl aṭanga Siaha vawi li a thlawk a, National Highway 54, Hrangchalkawn bakah Hnahthial/Tuipui South lam aṭangin awlsam taka kalpawh theih anih thu Chairman hian a sawi bawk.

Pi Rachel Lalrinhlui, Member Secretary leh Deputy Director, Tourism Department nibawk chuan Tourism Destination Management Committee hmalakna tur hrang hrang a tarlang a, Mizoramah khualzin lo lut tam chho mêkah hian mipuite leh department hrang hranga thawktute lungrual taka thawhho a ṭul thu sawiin, khuarel mawina tichhe lo zawnga hmalakna kalpui bakah tlawmngai pawl, kohhran leh khawtlang mipuite pawh kawng hrang hranga lo inbuatsaih a ṭul thu sawiin, khualzinte zarah ram mipuite hian hlawkna tam tak tel se tih hi sawrkar duhthusam anih thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin ṭhutkhawmah hian Tourism Destination Management Committee member-te an kal ṭha hle a, member-te chu – Tourism department, Forest department (MADC), PWD, Rural Development department, DPO, Police department, Art & Culture department (MADC) an ni. Chairman Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte chuan lawmthu sawina hun hman tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei District-a Special Intensive Revision kalpui dan tur chungchang sawi ho a ni
content:
649/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 21:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Level Standing Committee chu an Chairman, District Election Officer Pi Navneet Mann kaihhruaiin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm a. Election official-te, ERO leh AERO-te, NGO hruaitute leh political party hrang hrang ai awhte telin, Lunglei District-a Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui dan tur an sawi ho.

Chairman Pi Navneet Mann chuan Special Intensive Revision kalpui turah Lunglei District chu a inpeih fel thawkhat tawh tih sawiin, a hlawhtlinna turin political party leh NGO-te an pawimawh thu a sawi a. Roll dik leh felfai tak nei turin official-te leh NGO leh political party-te thawh ho ṭhat a ṭul thu sawiin, an ṭawiawmna leh thawhpuina a ngen nghal bawk.

Lunglei District-a SIR kalpui turah hian ruahman lawk dan chuan Booth Level Officer (BLO)-te tan Assembly Constituency tin a hrang zelin training buatsaih a ni dawn a. BLO training hi May ni 26, 2026-ah zawh tura ruahman a ni a. ECI hunbi ruat angin May ni 30, 2026 aṭanga June ni 28, 2026 chhungin BLO-te chu in tinah kal chhuakin, Enumeration Form sem, dah khah leh khawn khawm hna an thawk dawn a ni.

Electoral Roll hi a thar hlaka buatsaih a nih dawn avangin Enumeration Form theh lutte hming chauh Draft Roll-ah a chuang dawn a. Draft Roll hi June ni 5, 2026-ah tihchhuah tur a ni a. Draft Roll-a hming chuang ve lote chuan a hranin July ni 5, 2026 aṭanga August ni 4, 2026 chhungin ERO/AERO hnenah document dangte nen Roll-a luh dilna an theh luh a, a hrana hearing neih leh a ngai dawn a. Final Electoral Roll hi September ni 6, 2026-ah tihchhuah tur a ni.

He Special Intensive Revision chhung hian political party hrang hrangte'n an ai awh tur Booth Level Agent ruatin, anni hian Booth Level Officer-te nena thawk dunin ni khatah enumeration form 50 chin an theh luhsak thei dawn a. Draft Roll tihchhuah hnuah erawh chuan ni khatah enumeration form 10 an theh lut thei thung dawn a. Tun dinhmunah hian Lunglei District-ah Booth Level Agent hi political party hrang hrang ai awh 600 ruat an ni tawh.

NGO ai awhte pawhin Roll dik leh felfai nei turin a ṭul anga theih tawp chhuah an inhuam thu an sawi a. Lunglei District-ah hian Special Intensive Revision chungchanga zawh duh nei tan Toll Free Number 1950-ah emaw, ERO Office leh District Level-a Help Desk-ah emaw thu zawh fiah theih a nih thu tar lan a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: IPRP&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova'n Lungleia a department chan hrang hrang hmunhma tlawhin, a enfiah
content:
648/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 21:IPRP&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan vawiin khan Lungleia a department chan hrang hrang – Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S); Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs (FCS&CA) leh Land Revenue & Settlement (LR&S) hmunhma te tlawhin, thawktute nen department hma lakna leh thil pawimawh hrang hrang an sawi ho.

IPRP&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova hian Lunglei District Court sakna atana Mizoram Government Press awmna, Lunglawna P&S hmunhma leh building nena ram inthleng dilna leh rawtna awm mek avangin vawiin khan Government Press hi a hmunah a en a. HPC Vice Chairman Pu V. Malsawmtluanga, IPRP&S Secretary Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, Joint Secretary Pu Lalremruata Ralte, P&S Controller Pu Benjamin Lalzama te bakah, LMC councillor-te, department official-te leh political party hruaitute'n an ṭawiawm.

Minister ho hian P&S hmunhma en ho a nih bakah, District Court hmunhma leh Rahsivenga District Court ram tura ruahmante en ho a ni bawk a. District Court-ah District and Sessions Judge Pi R. Lalduhawmi hovin Court official-te leh Bar Association hruaitute'n lo dawngsawngin, hmunhma inthleng rawtna chungchanga thil pawimawh hrang hrang an sawi ho.

Government Press, Lunglawn an tlawhnaah Minister chuan Printing & Stationery ram, Lunglawna mi chu District Court building sakna atan Bar Association te'n an dil thu leh indawrna a kal mek thu sawiin, Bar Association chuan Aizawlah Chief Minister leh amah pawh an hmuh tawh thu a sawi a. Sawrkar kalphungah chuan khawi hmun pawh ni se, ram leh mipuite tana thil ṭha zawk a thlen theih dawn chuan department leh department karah ram inthleng te chu a thleng ṭhin tih sawiin, Aizawl aṭanga, "A ṭha alawm," tih ngawt chi a nih loh avangin P&S Office Lunglawn chu a hmuna hmuh ngei duhin a tlawh tih a sawi.

Tunah hian sawrkar chuan Bar Association hnenah a hlan ngei ang tih a la awm lo tiin, Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan en ho va, sawi ho va, ngaihtuah zel a nih tur thu leh Chief Minister hnenah pawh a ṭul dan azirin report theh luh a nih tur thu a sawi a. Sawrkarin a duh ber chu khawi ram pawh ni se, ram tana ṭhatna tur a nih chuan hlan phal mai tur tih a nih thu a sawi.

IPRP&S Minister chuan P&S chu department lo inbun nghet tawh an nih thu leh ram tana service lo pe reng tawh an nih thu sawiin, changtlung zawka P&S chu kalpui tum mek a nih thu te, Lunglei Printing & Stationery office pawh a ṭiavai zawng ni lo, a ngelnghet zawnga kalpui tum mek a nih thu te a sawi a. P&S chuan sawrkar document pawimawh – election leh assembly thil bakah, sawrkar thil pawimawh tam tak an buaipui thu sawiin, kuminah pawh Education Department nen thawk hovin zirlaibu (textbook) an chhu tih a sawi a. Zirlaibu chu sikul ṭan hmaa chhut zawh vek a nih thu leh Mizo firm an hman thu te, a lehkha phek (paper quality) pawh a ṭhat thu te a sawi a; stationery item hrang hrang pawh quality ṭha zawk leh man tlawm zawka an hralh chhuah reng thu a sawi.

Lunglei District Court-a inkawmna tawi buatsaihah Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan department leh department inkarah kar awl awm lo va, thawh hona ṭha tak neih chu ṭul a tih thu a sawi a. A department chana thawktute rilru leh ngaihtuahna a ṭawmpui thu leh department tan leh ram tana ṭha ber tura hma lak zel a duh thu sawiin, Judiciary tihchak pawimawhna te, P&S tihchangtlunna tur leh tuartu leh nek chep zawk an awm lohna tur te ngaihtuah chung zela ṭha tak leh inpawh tlang taka sawi ho zel ṭha a tih thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Lunglei HPC Vice Chairman Pu V. Malsawmtluanga, IPRP&S Secretary Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, District & Sessions Judge Pi R. Lalduhawmi leh Bar Association Lunglei Sub-Headquarters President Pu ZD Lalnunsanga te pawhin thu an sawi.

Minister hian DCSO Office, Revenue Office leh I&PR Office te a tlawh bawk a. Office hmunhma fang kualin, thawktute nen office mamawh leh ṭul hrang hrang an sawi ho a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Lalrinpuii graces the first State Level Convention for Women Elected Representatives of Village Councils
content:
98/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 21st May, 2026:The first "State Level Convention for Women Elected Representatives of Village Councils" was successfully conducted by the Rural Development & Administration Department (RD&AD), Government of Mizoram today at Vanapa Hall, Aizawl. Smt Lalrinpuii, Minister of Health & Family Welfare Department graced the landmark event as the Chief Guest, while Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister of RD&AD attended as the Guest of Honor.

Smt. Lalrinpuii, the Chief Guest acknowledged the historic trajectory of women leaders from Annie Besant to President Droupadi Murmu, noting the legacy of Mizoram's Ropuiliani. As Mizoram’s first female Cabinet Minister, she highlighted the impact of the 73rd and 74th Amendments and the 2023 Parliament bill providing 33% reservation for women. She exhorted the elected representatives to serve with integrity, lead with self-reliance, and act as pioneers in rectifying local governance deficiencies.

Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister of RD&AD applauded the societal advancement of Mizo women in collaborative governance. He urged the female leaders to optimize Village Council funds for grassroots development, emphasized the significance of creating an Own Source of Revenue (OSR), and assured ongoing departmental support.

Distinguished Guests Smt Baryl Vanneihsangi, MLA (Aizawl South III AC) and Smt Prova Chakma, MLA (West Tuipui AC) also delivered motivational short speeches to the delegates.

Dr. Lalngura Tlau, Director of Local Administration Department (LAD) delivered Keynote Address, detailing the implementation of The Mizoram Village Council Act, 2025. Formulated closely on the national Panchayati Raj framework, it integrates 22 out of 29 statutory subjects, with extensive guidelines on building village sustainability through OSR and local tax mobilization.

The Director presented the structural demographic seat layout, stating that under the 9 Districts Village Council framework, there are 2,414 total seats (1,799 general, 615 reserved). Within the Autonomous District Council (ADC) areas, the CADC has 516 total seats (428 general, 88 reserved); the LADC has 595 total seats (496 general, 99 reserved); and the MADC has 591 total seats (492 general, 99 reserved).

The convention, chaired by Shri R. Zarzosanga, Commissioner & Secretary of RD&AD was attended by 503 registered female leaders, representing a notable 55% turnout. The event commenced with an invocation prayer by Pastor PL Biakchhawna.

Following a screening of the “Women Friendly GP Video Clip Presentation” and musical interludes, the morning session closed with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri Lalchawimawia, Joint Director & SNO RGSA, Directorate of LA, RD&AD.

The afternoon session commenced with a motivational speech on the topic "Roles and responsibilities of WERs in local economic development & social justice" by Smt Rita Lalnunmawii Pachuau Director of ATI, followed by an interactive “Experience Sharing & Discussion” forum facilitated by the State Panchayat Resource Centre (SPRC).

The convention concluded with closing remarks delivered by Shri S.T. Lalhmingmawia, Joint Director (P) of Local Administration.

Attachment

title: State Level Consultative Workshop on 'Developing Global Standard Tourist Destinations' held
content:
97/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 21st May, 2026:A State Level Consultative Workshop on “Developing Global Standard Tourist Destinations” was held today at the Economics & Statistics Department Conference Hall, MINECO, Khatla, under the aegis of the Tourism Department. The workshop was attended by Shri Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister for Tourism, Government of Mizoram.

This workshop was organized to discuss the roadmap for Mizoram, in line with the Central Government's plan to establish at least one world-class tourist destination capable of competing globally in every State and Union Territory across India.

Speaking on the occasion, Minister Shri Lalnghinglova Hmar stated that tourism has immense potential in Mizoram and can significantly contribute to the growth and development of the State and its economy. At the same time, the Minister pointed out that there are several important factors that need to be considered in order to attract tourists and further develop the sector. The Minister emphasized the need to properly inform tourists about various tourist destinations in Mizoram, and the best time and reasons for visiting those places. Commending the Tourism Department for creating the Mizoram Tourism Calendar for this purpose, he invited the attendees to freely share their opinions and suggestions for further development.

Shri Lalnghinglova Hmar further highlighted that tourism benefits not only the destinations visited by tourists but also the surrounding areas and local communities. Therefore, he stressed the importance of outsourcing(engaging those outside of government employment) and community participation in the tourism sector. The Minister also urged those working in the hospitality and transport sectors to conduct their businesses in a proper, fair and transparent manner, and appealed to the people of Mizoram to preserve and protect the state's natural beauty, cultural heritage and lifestyle, and to value the tourist destinations within their own state. The Minister stated that such efforts would greatly help in attracting tourists from outside the State and in promoting the tourism sector.

Commissioner & Secretary to the Chief Minister Shri Vanlaldina Fanai also remarked that Mizoram is a unique and beautiful destination capable of attracting tourists. However, he noted that the tourism sector in Mizoram still remains a 'high value, low footfall' sector. To further develop tourism in Mizoram, Pu Vanlaldina Fanai stated that there is a need to work harder, learn from the best practices of other places, establish good cooperation with local communities, delegate responsibilities as required, and effectively promote the state’s uniqueness.

Welcoming the gathering today, Smt. Irene Zohlimpuii Chongthu, Addl Secretary, Tourism Department stated that the Central Government aims to establish at least one 'world-class tourist destination' in every State and Union Territory across India. She highlighted the steps already taken by the Tourism Department toward this goal and outlined their future plans. Following this, Tourist Officer Smt. R. Lalrinchhani gave a PowerPoint Presentation detailing the requirements for becoming a world-class tourist destination.

The attendees then participated in a sharing and discussion session. Subsequently, Smt. R. Lalrodingi, OSD to the Chief Minister, concluded the event by stating that the Tourism Department cannot function in isolation from other departments and emphasized the need for continuous inter-departmental cooperation. She also appealed to the people of Mizoram that they should welcome tourists as guests of their own land.

Attachment

title: ICCW BRAVERY AWARDS 2026 CHUNGCHANGA SAITUAL SP THU CHHUAH
content:
647/2026-2027

Saitual, the 21st May, 2026:ICCW Bravery Awards 2026 chungchangah Saitual SP Pu Vivek Kumar Maurya chuan a hnuaia tarlan ang hian thu a chhuah.

Indian Council for Child Welfare (ICCW) chuan kumin hian mi huaisen chawimawina ICCW Bravery Awards 2026 chu naupang leh thalai huaisen te hnenah a sem dawn a.

Naupang emaw thalai emaw he chawimawina phua kan hriat, huaisenna lo lantir tawh te chu ni 30.09.2026 ral hmain nomination thehluh tur a ni. Nomination form leh hemi kaihhnawih hriat chian duh nei tan Mizoram Police Website-ah en theih a ni e.

title: Leihriak renchem chungchanga Mipui ngenna
content:
646/2026-2027

Aizawl the 21st May, 2026:Tuna Asia khawthlang lama buaina awm mek avanga Prime Minister in leihriak renchem leh a loa awm theih thila sum hman renchem chungchanga ngenna a lo siam tawh angin, Mizoram Sawrkar chuan he ngenna hi zawma tihlawhtling turin Mizoram Mipui te a ngen a ni.

Mizoram chu State pawn atanga bungraw chaw lut thin kan nih avangin, ram chhunga leihriak man pung leh bungraw phurh man pung hian a nghawng nghal lo thei lo a. Heng te a nih avang hian sawrkar sum renchem kawngah leh heng thil hlu kan neihte vawn chungchangah mipuite a theih ang anga hma la turin Sawrkar chuan mipuite a ngen a ni.

Heng hun chhung hian mahni lirthei hmang lova, a theih anga tam public transport hmang uar tura ngen kan ni a. Lirthei inhman ṭawm pawh a theih ang anga kal pui turin Sawrkar chuan mipuite a chah a. He hun chhung hian tul lova zin chhuah pumpelh hram turin a ngen.

Eirawngbawlna Gas (LPG) te renchem taka hmang tur leh hman loh kara off zel turin a ngen a. Local Bodies, tlawmngai pawl, sumdawng leh Private Institution te pawh he hmalakna hi theih tawpa thlawp turin Sawrkar chuan a ngen bawk.

Mizoram Sawrkar chuan ram mipuite he hun khirh tak kan tawn mek chhung a, sawrkar tha ti chak tur leh ram leh hnam tana, heng ngenna hi tha thlah lo va, a tihhlawhtlin kawnga theih tawp chhuah turin a ngen tak meuh meuh a ni.

title: Tourism Minister hovin State Level Consultative Workshop neih a ni
content:
645/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 21st May, 2026: Vawiin khan Tourism Department huaihawtin Economics & Statistics Department Conference Hall, MINECO, Khatla-ah State Level Consultative Workshop on 'Developing Global Standard Tourist Destinations' neih a ni a, workshop hi Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan a telpui a ni.

India ram chhunga State leh Union Territory tina khawvel hmun dangte el phak khualzinte tlawh duhna hmun(tourist destination) pakhat tal neih tura Sorkar laipuiin a rel angin, Mizoram tana hmalak dan tur sawiho turin he workshop hi buatsaih a ni.

He hunah hian Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan thu sawiin, Mizoram-ah hian Tourism hian potential nasa tak a nei a, chu chuan State leh a economy hmasawnna atan pawh nasa takin a thawh theih thu a sawi a. Hemi rual hian Minister chuan khualzin hip nan leh he sector tihhmasawn zel nan hian thil pawimawh tak tak ngaihtuah tur a awm a ni, a ti. Minister chuan tourist-te hnenah Mizorama hmun tlawh tur hrang hrangte, tlawh hun tha ber leh tlawh chhan turte dik taka hrilh an ngaih thu a sawi a; hemi atana Tourism Department-in Mizoram Tourism Calendar an siam chu fakin, kalkhawmte chu an ngaihdan leh rawtnate inthlahrung lova thawhkhawm turin a sawm bawk a ni.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Tourism hian khualzinte tlawh hmun chauh ni loin, a chhehvela hmun dangte leh mite thlengin hlawkna a pe a ti a. Hemi avang hian Minister chuan he sector-ah hian Sorkar hnathawk ni lo midang ruat (outsourcing) leh khawtlang mipuite (community) nena tantlan a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni. Minister chuan hospitality leh transport sector-a hna thawktute chuan an sumdawnna chu dik leh thianghlim taka kalpui turin a fuih a. Mizoram mipuite chu an ram mawina leh zia-rang leh nunphung (cultural heritage) te vawng nung leh humhalh tlat tur leh mahni state chhunga khualzinna hmun te ngai hlu turin a chah a. Hei hian State pawn lam mikhualte hip nan leh tourism sector tihhmasawn nan nasa takin a tanpui dawn tih a sawi a ni. Sorkar laipui Commissioner & Secretary to CM Pu Vanlaldina Fanai pawhin Mizoram chu khualzinte hip thei hmun danglam leh mawi tak a ni a ti a; amaherawhchu, Mizoram tourism sector hi tun thlengin 'hlu si, tlawh tlem' ('High value, low footfall') sector a la nih thu a sawi a. Mizoram tourism tihhmasawn lehzual nan Pu Vanlaldina Fanai chuan kan thawh rim lehzual a ngaih thu te, hmun dangte tihdan tha (best practices) zir a ngaih thu te, khawtual mipuite nen thawh hona tha neih a  tul thu te, mamawh dan anga hna insem te, leh state danglam bikna (uniqueness) te chawilar thiam a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni.

Vawiin hunah hian Tourism Department Additional Secretary Pi Irene Zohlimpuii Chongthu chuan kalkhawmte lo lawmin Sorkar laipui chuan India ram chhunga State leh Union Territory tinah 'world-class tourist destination' pakhat theuh tal neih tir a tum thu a sawi a. Chumi atana hma an lak tawhna te tarlangin an hmachhawp te a sawi bawk. Hemi hnuah hian Tourist Officer Pi R. Lalrinchhanin PowerPoint Presentation hmangin world-class tourist destination ni tura thil tulte a sawi fiah a ni.

He hunah hian kalkhawmte chuan an ngaihdan leh rawtnate sawihona hun an hmang a. OSD to CM Pi R. Lalrodingi chuan tourism department hi department dang hrang hrang nen tangkawp a thawk lo thei lo a nih avangin department hrang hrang karah thawhhona tha a awm zui zel a duh thu a sawi a. Mizoram mikhual te chu ram leilung fate ngeiin kan lo mikhual tur a ni tiin vawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Siaha-ah Special Intensive Revision (SIR) chungchangah thukhawm
content:
644/2026-2027

Siaha the 21st May 2026:Electoral roll dik leh felfai a awm theih nana Election Commission of India (ECI) in kum 10 dana a buatsaih thin Special Intensive Revision (SIR) chungchanga thutkhawm chu vawiin khan DC mini conference hall, Siaha-ah District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte, District Election Officer (DEO) ni bawk kaihhruainain neih a ni.

DEO Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan political party aiawh kalkhawmte chu democracy ramah an pawimawh hle thu a sawi a, e roll felfai leh thianghlim a awm theih nan fimkhur hle tur leh duhsakna avanga roll a thun lo turin a fuih a ni. Tupawh India khua leh tui ni a, kum 18 tling tawh chu roll a thun theih an ni a, vote neih chu ram rorelna kawng sial kawngah an dikna chanvo a ni tiin roll a chuang tawh chu paih leh a harsa hle a, raltlante leh India khua leh tui nilo te thun palh an nih loh nan in venga, theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni.

Election Officer Pu Vabeimozachhi Chozah pawhin Special Intensive Revision nihphung tlangpui sawifiahna a nei a, draft roll tarchhuah a nih hun tur te, claims and objections chungchangte leh final roll tarchhuah a nih hun tur te a tarlang.

Political Party aiawh kalkhawmte chu Booth Level Agent ruat theuh tura chahin roll felfai tak a awm theih nan thawhhopuiah a sawm bawk a ni.

ECI chuan Mizoram Special Intensive Revision chu May ni 20 atanga September Ni 6, 2026 thleng neih turin a puang a, qualifying date atan July Ni 1, 2026 chu hman a ni. May Ni 30- 28th June 2026 chhungin BLO ten in tin tlawh chhuahna an nei anga, draft roll tarchhuah hun tur chu July Ni 5, 2026 a ni ang. Final e roll tarchhuah hun tur chu September Ni 6, 2026 a ni.

SIR neih turah hian e roll a thara siam a ni dawn a, vote nei tawh tan pawn enumeration form hmangin e roll ah hming ziahluh dilna thehluh tur a ni. BLO ten enumeration form hi in tinah an sem dawn a ni.

Siaha District ah hian ERO atan Pu M Misael (DRDO PD) leh Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie (Addl DC) te ruat an ni a, AERO atan Pi H Lalenkawli (SDC) leh Pu Z Lalnghaktluanga (SDC) te ruat an ni bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit Bialtu MLA in TEJAS District Awareness Programme hmanpui
content:
643/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 21st of May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Chhim Veng YMA Hall, Mamit-ah TEJAS (Transforming Entrepreneurial Journeys Across States & Districts) District Awareness Programme chu Er.H.Lalzirliana, Mamit Bialtu MLA chuan Khual lian niin a hmanpui. He programme hi Startup India, Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Government of India, Mizoram Startup Mission (MSUM), Planning & Programme Implementation Department, Government of Mizoram leh Mamit Deputy Commissioner te ṭang ho huaihawt a ni a, entrepreneurs hlawhtling leh department hotute atangin thu ngaihthlak a ni.

Er. H. Lalzirliana chuan he awareness programme hi Mamit district hmasawnna atan a pawimawh thu sawiin kan theihna(potential) kan neih that haichhuhna atan tangkai taka hmang turin zirlai kalte chu a chah a. Sawrkar Laipui chuan kum 2047-ah chuan India ram hi ram changkang (developed country) leh intodelh rama hlangkai tumin a bei mek a,hemi kawngah hian Mizoram pawhin nasa takin hma kan lak a ngai a, hna zawngtu mai ni loin hna siamtu nih kan tum tur a ni a ti. Mamit bialtu MLA chuan kan khawvel changkang zelah chuan a che rangin hlawhtlinna an chang a, thawhrimna bakah fing leh remhre taka hnathawh a ngai a, smart work a pawimawh tawh hle a ni a ti a.Khawvel inher danglam zelah kan ngaihtuahna te,kan thil thlir dan leh lehkha kan zir dan thlengin kan her danglam ve zel a ngai a, hlawhltlinna nei tur chuan duhna (drive) a san a ngai a, kan tumah hlawhtling lo thin mah ila  beidawng loa beih hram hram nun neih a ngai a ni a ti.

Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap chuan hun hmanpuiin sumdawnna lama eizawnna tan tur hian tlai luat a awm lo a, tumna a awm chuan theih loh a awm lo a ni a ti a, zirlai kalte hnenah chuan TEJAS awareness programme chu hlawkthlak taka hmang tur leh zawhna an neih angte chu zawt turin a chah a ni.

Vawiin programme-ah hian department hrang hrang atangin an hmalakna ngaihthlak a ni a, MSUM atangin TEJAS ina a tum bakah Startup India leh Mizorama entrepreneurs te than len  theihna kawng te ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Chawhnu session-ah hian “Master class on Supply Chain Management & Made by Mizo””Master Class on Book-keeping & overview of GST” bakah “Overview of Mizoram Banakaih Venture Capital Fund” tih thupui hmangin mi thiamte hnen atangin thu ngaihthlak a ni a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni bawk.

Vawiin hunah hian zirlai 80 chuang bakah sumdawnna kalpui mek leh bul ṭan tum te leh hemi lama tui te telin mi 180 chuang an ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Pi Lalrinpuii’n Village Council Hmeichhe Inkhawmpui hmasa ber hmanpui
content:
642/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 21stMay, 2026:Vawiin khan Rural Development & Administration Department (RD&AD) buatsaihin Mizorama a vawi khatna atan Vanapa Hall-ah VC Hmeichhe Inkhawmpui "State Level Convention for Women Elected Representative of Village Councils" hman a ni a. He hunah hian Health & Family Welfare Department Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chu khuallian niin hun a hmanpui a, RD&AD Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chu khualzahawm a ni. He hun hi Sawrkar laipui leh Mizoram Sawrkar-in tualchhung inrelbawlnaa hmeichhiate hmun pawimawh tak luah tura a ngaihtuahna a sen kalpui mek denchhena buatsaih a ni.

Khuallian Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan hmanlai leh tunlai hun thlirin hmeichhiate dinhmun a that chhoh zel thu a sawi a. Hun a lo inthlak danglam zel rualin ram pum thlir erawh chuan hmeichhe dinhmun hi a lo la hniam hle a ni, a ti. India rama hmeichhia sulhnu nei thate chungchang sawiin, Mizo hmeichhe zingah pawh ram leh hnam tana hruaitu ropui Pi Ropuiliani’n sulhnu a neih that thu a sawi a, hetiang hruaitu tha tak tak lo awm tawh mah se hmeichhiate tana hmasawnna tur kawng tam tak a la awm tih a sawi.

Khuallian chuan thusawi chhunzawmin, hmeichhiate chawikan an nih theih nan 73rdleh 74thAmendment Act hmangin Panchayat leh tualchhung inrelbawlnaah 33% women reservation a awm a ni, a ti a. Parliament pawhin kum 2023 khan hmeichhiate tan 33% reservation a lo pass tawh thu sawiin, tun hnuah Mizo hmeichhiate zingah hruaitu tha leh fel tak tak thahnem tak an awm hi chhuanawm a tih zia a sawi bawk. Hmeichhiate dinhmun a lo that zel rual hian mawhphurhna sang tak an nei chho zel a ni, a ti a. Village Council hmeichhe hruaitute chu mahni inring tawk leh lu zo taka an nihna hlen chhuak ngei turin a fuih a. Mipui thlan tlin an nihna angin mipuite tan rinawmna nena hna thawk tur leh, tualchhung inrelbawlna kawnga a chhia leh hmaih awmte siam tha turin a chah a ni. Tualchhung sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrangah hmeichhiate chu sulsutu leh hma latu ni turin a fuih a, an theihna zawng zawngin mipui, khawtlang leh ram tan theihtawp chhuah zel turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Khualzahawm Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Mizote zingah hmeichhiate chawisan a an awm chu a lawmpui thu a sawi a. Hmeichhiate chu thawhhonaah an tangkai mai bakah an pawimawh hle a ni, a ti. VC hmeichhe hruaitute kalkhawm hnenah VC fund an dawn te chu khawtlang hmasawnna a hmang turin a chah a, own source of revenue pawimawhna te sawiin a tulnaah chuan Department-in a lo puih tur thu a sawi a. Minister chuan VC hmeichhe inkhawmpui hmasa bera a tel thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, thawhhona tha an neih theih nan duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He inkhawmpuia khualthate (distinguished guests) - MLA, Aizawl South III Assembly Constituency Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi leh MLA, West Tuipui Assembly Constituency Pi Prova Chakma te hnen atang thusawi pawimawh tak tak ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Local Administration Department Director Dr. Lalngura Tlau hnen atangin inkhawmpui tum leh report ngaihthlak a ni a. Director chuan sorkar hmalakna thar tarlangin, chipchiar takin ‘The Mizoram Village Council Act, 2025’ kan neih tawh thu a sawi a. He dan thar hi India rama Panchayati Raj system zul zuia duan a nih thu sawiin, Panchayati Raj-in subject 29 a neih chu Mizoram dan tharah pawh subject 22 dah a nih thu a tarlang. Sawrkar Laipuiin Gram Panchayat hnuaia a duan Own Source of Revenue (OSR) chungchang pawh sawiin, tualchhung khuate an lo intodelh a, mahni kea an intun din theih nan OSR neih tam theih dante, chhiah khawn dan hrang hrang leh sum tihpun theihna kawng hrang hrangte he dan thar hian a hrilhfiah vek a ni, a ti. Dr. Lalngura Tlau chuan LAD scheme Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) hnuaia Capacity Building and Training kalpui mekah thla tin training a kal theih thu a sawi a. District 8-ah District Panchayat Resource Centre siam tawh niin, VC hmeichhe hruaitute chuan thlahthlam lova training hi kal turin a chah a. Panchayat Bhavan (VC Office) sak mek a nih thu sawiin, kumin chhung chauh pawh hian hmun 40 ah sak a nih tawh chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

District pakua Village Council dinhmun tlangpui a sawite chu hetiang hi a ni:-Total seats - 2414, General seats - 1799 Reserved seats - 615. Autonomous District Council (ADC) Area dinhmun:- CADC Area: Total seats - 516, General seats - 428, Reserved seats - 88 niin, LADC Area: Total seats - 595, General seats - 496, Reserved seats - 99 a ni a. MADC Area: Total seats - 591, General Seats - 492, Reserved Seats - 99 a awm a ni.

Vawiin Vanapa Hall-a "State Level Convention for Women Elected Representative of Village Councils" hlawhtling taka hman takah hian Mizoram chhung hmun hrang hrang atangin VC Hmeichhe hruaitute (Women Elected Representatives) 503 zet an tel a. Director chuan hetiang zat hmeichhe hruaitu kalkhawm thei, za zela 55 (55%) lai an tling thei chu lawmawm a tih thu leh Mizo hmeichhiate tan chhuanawm tak an nih zia a sawi a ni.

Vawiin hun ti hlawhtling tura Sawrkar hmalakna tarlangtu "Women Friendly GP Video Clip" thlir ho a ni a, RD&AD Commissioner & Secretary Pu R. Zarzosanga chuan chawhma inkhawm hi kaihruaiin, Joint Director & SNO RGSA, Directorate of LA, RD&AD Pu Lalchawimawia chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Chawhnu lamah hun hmang chhunzawmin Director, Administrative Training Institute (ATI) Pi Rita Lalnunmawii Pachuau hnen atangin "Roles and responsibilities of WERs in local economic development & social justice" tih thupui pawimawh tak hmangin Motivational Speech hlawkthlak tak ngaihthlak a ni a.

Hemi bakah State Panchayat Resource Centre (SPRC) hovin tawnhriat inhrilhna leh sawihona "Experience Sharing & Discussion" hun hlawkthlak tak hman a ni a, khaw hrang hranga hmeichhe hruaitu kalkhawmte chuan tualchhung inrelbawlna kawnga an harsatna tawnte leh hlawhtlinna hrang hrangte inhrilh tawnin, inkawmhhona hlawkthlak tak an nei.

Joint Director (P), Directorate of LA, RD&AD Pu S.T. Lalhmingmawia chuan inkhawmpui kharna thu sawiin hun a ti tawp a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram CEO Explains Process of SIR 2026
content:
96/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 21 May, 2026:Mizoram Chief Electoral Officer (CEO), Garima Gupta today explained the process of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls 2026 and highlighted various important aspects related to SIR 2026.

The CEO stated that the main objective of SIR 2026 is to ensure that all eligible voters are included in the Electoral Roll while preventing the inclusion of ineligible persons. She said that maintaining a clean and accurate Electoral Roll is the most important part of the exercise and emphasized that it forms the foundation of democracy.

She informed that extensive preparations are underway across all districts in Mizoram for SIR 2026. Enumeration forms have already been downloaded in all districts, making Mizoram the first among the 16 states undertaking Phase-III SIR to complete the downloading process. Printing of the forms has also begun and is expected to be completed on Friday, the 22nd May.

The CEO said that all existing voters, including those whose names already appear in the current electoral roll, will have to submit fresh enumeration forms. Booth Level Officers (BLOs) will conduct house-to-house visits from May 30 to June 28, 2026, during which they will distribute enumeration forms to voters in their respective areas.

After filling up the forms, voters may submit them to the BLOs or upload them online. BLOs will upload the received Enumeration Forms through the BLO App, while hard copies will be safely preserved by the CEO’s office for official records.

The CEO further stated that voters should verify whether their names appeared in the last Intensive Revision Electoral Roll conducted in Mizoram in 2005. Those who have recently become eligible voters should check whether the names of their parents or ancestors appeared in the 2005 Roll. Persons whose names, or whose parents’ or ancestors’ names, do not appear in the 2005 Roll will be required to apply for inclusion in the Electoral Roll through Form-6.

She said the exercise aims to ensure that long-time voters, genuine residents of Mizoram and eligible Indian citizens are properly included in the Electoral Roll. Special attention is also being given to new voters. Persons attaining the age of 18 years as on July 1, 2026, will be eligible for inclusion as new voters.

The draft Electoral Roll is scheduled to be published on July 5, 2026. A two-month period will then be provided for submission of claims and objections. During this period, eligible persons whose names are not included in the draft roll may apply for inclusion, while objections may also be raised regarding names of persons not eligible to vote. The draft roll will be made available for public viewing, including online through the CEO’s official website.

Claims and objections will be examined by the District Election Officers (DEOs), and persons not satisfied with the decisions may approach the CEO for further appeal.

Attachment

title: SIR CHUNGCHANGAH SERCHHIPA POLITICAL PARTY HRANG HRANGTE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH A NI – ENUMERATION FORM SUBMIT LOTE CHU ELECTORAL ROLL-AH AN HMING A CHUANG VE DAWN LO
content:
641/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 21stMay 2026:Special Intensive Revision chungchangah vawiin khan Serchhip District chhunga Political Party hrang hrangte pualin Training pawimawh tak DC Meeting Hall, Serchhip-ah buatsaih a ni. District Election Officer Pu Paul L. Khuma’n kaihruaiin, Serchhip District-a Political party hrang hrang – ZPM, INC leh MNF hruaitute an tel a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan training huaihawt a nih chhan sawiin, SIR chu Electoral Roll thenfai leh siam that hna Election Commission of India atanga hmalakna kal mek a nih thu a sawi a. Electoral Roll thar siam nana in tina kala (house-to-house visit), voter-te hming, kum, leh nihnate ziah luh thar hna (enumeration), langtlang tak leh fimkhur taka kalpui tur a nih thu sawiin, Political party aiawh kalkhawmte chu thawh hona tha tak neih puiah a sawm a; Serchhip mipuite pawh Special Intensive Revision kalpui mek hi ram hnuk khawih thil tak meuh a nih avangin lo ngai pawimawh theuh turin a sawm bawk a ni.

Vawiin training-ah hian Election Officer Pi Lalchhanhimi’n SIR chungchanga thil pawimawhte sawi zauna leh zirtirna a nei a, tun dinhmunah Serchhip District chu Electoral roll-a hming thlunzawmna (mapping) kawngah Mizoram-ah a titha ber niin, 91% chuang mapping tih zawh tawh a nih thu a sawi.

Nimin May ni 20, 2026 atang khan Special Intensive Revision hi tan niin, May ni 30 – June ni 28, 2026 chhungin Booth Level officer (BLO) ten in tin tlawh chhuaka   Enumeration Form sem leh lakkhawm hnate an thawk tan dawn a, Political party hrang hrang aiawh Booth level Agent (BLA) ten BLO te hi an tawiawm dawn a ni. June ni 5-ah Draft Roll tih chhuah a ni dawn a, siam that ngai leh complain neite tan August ni 8 thleng hun hawn a ni anga, September ni  6, 2026-ah Final E-Roll tih chhuah a ni ang. Enumeration Form submit lote chu E-Roll-ah an hming a chuang ve dawn lo a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram CEO -in SIR 2026 kalphung tur a sawifiah
content:
640/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 21 May, 2026:Election Commission of India duhdan angin Mizoram Chief Electoral Officer (CEO) Pi Garima Gupta chuan vawiin khan Special Intensive Revision of Electoral Rolls 2026 kalphung tur sawiin, SIR 2026 kaihhnawih thil pawimawh hrang hrang a tarlang.

CEO chuan SIR 2026 thiltum ber chu vote nei thei zawng zawngte Electoral Roll-a thun vek an nih theihna tur leh vote nei thei lote E-Roll a an luh lohna tura hmalak  a ni, a ti. Electoral Roll thianghlim leh felfai siam chu an hmalakna pawimawh ber a ni a, chu chu democracy innghahna bulpui a nih thu a sawi bawk.

SIR 2026 atan hian Mizoram District zawng zawngah inbuatsaihna nasa taka kalpui mek a nih thu a sawi a. Enumeration form-te chu district zawng zawngah download fel tawh niin, Phase-III SIR kalpui mektu state 16 zingah Mizoram chu enumeration form download zo thei hmasa ber a ni, a ti. Form print hna pawh tan tawh niin, May ni 22 ah zawh fel beisei a ni, a ti bawk.

CEO chuan electoral roll hmasaa hming chuang tawhte pawh tiamin, vote nei  tawh zawng zawngten enumeration form thar submit leh vek tur a nih thu a sawi a. Block Level Officer (BLO)-te chuan May 30 atanga June 28, 2026 thleng in tin an tlawh dawn a, an area chhunga voter-te hnenah enumeration form an sem dawn, a ti a. Voter-te chuan form an fill up zawhah BLO-te hnenah an pe ang a, online-ah pawh upload theih a ni bawk. BLO-ten Enumeration Form an dawnte chu BLO App hmangin an upload ang a, hard copy-te chu official record atan CEO office chuan a vawng tha ang.

CEO chuan Mizorama Intensive Revision neih hnuhnung ber 2005 electoral roll-ah voter te chuan an hming a chuan leh chuan loh an en dik anga; hetih hunlaia vote la nei hman lo te chuan, an nu leh pa emaw, an thlahtute hming a chuang em, tih an en anga; 2005 Roll-a anmahni emaw an thlahtute hming chuang lo te chuan Form-6 hmangin E-Roll a luh dilna an thehluh a ngai dawn a ni, a ti bawk.

He SIR hian kum tam tak vote lo nei tawhte, Mizoram mi leh India khua leh tui dik takte electoral roll-a chuan tir vek chu a tum ber a ni a.Voter lut thar turte pawh ngaih pawimawh an ni a. July 1, 2026 a kum 18 tling chinte chu voter thar atan telh theih an ni ang. Draft electoral roll chu July 5-ah tihchhuah tur a ni a. Chuta hming lang lo, vote nei thei ngei si, inthunlut duh te; vote nei thei lo tur, an hming draft roll a lo langte paih tura rawtna - claim leh objection thehluhna atan thla hnih hun pek a ni ang. Draft roll chu mipui hmuh theih turin tarchhuah a ni dawn a, online-a en duh tan CEO website-ah pawh en theih a ni ang. Claim leh objection-te chu District Election Officer (DEO)-ten an ngaihtuah ang a, chuta lungawi lo tan CEO hnenah thlen theih a ni dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT BAWRHSAP HOVIN ‘THENZAWL PEACE CITY’ HMALAKNA  CHUNGCHANG SAWI HO
content:
639/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 21stMay 2026 :Nimin khan Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruaiiin, Consultant Firm IPE Global Limited leh Serchhip District-a Department hrang hrang hotute’n Thenzawl Peace City dinna tura thil pawimawh chi hrang hrangte, DC Meeting hall Serchhip-ah an sawi ho.

He consultation meeting-ah hian Thenzawl Peace City atana Detailed Project Report (DPR) siamtu IPE Global Limited chuan ruahmanna an siam dan  hrang hrangte Power Point Presentation (PPT) hmangin an entir a. Department hrang hrang hnen atanga an mamawh hrang hrangte thlenin, Peace City   area huam chhunga sawrkar department ten   ram an neih zat leh hmalakna hrang hrang lo awm tawh leh awm mek te pawh ruahmanna siam nan an hnena hriattir turin an ngen a, Department hrang hrang aiawhte pawhin an department project neih sa leh ram hmunhmate tarlangin hma lak zel dan turte sawi ho a ni a; heng hmalakna hrang hrangte hi plan (ruahmanna) siam nan DPR siam mekah an lo dah tel vek tur thu IPE Global Limited chuan an sawi a ni.

IPE Global Limited hi ram 100 chuang zeta hna thawk tawh leh India ram chhung hmun hrang hranga City Master Plan hlawhtling taka lo ruahman tawh thin, khawvel pum huapa consultancy firm lian leh rintlak a ni a; Mizoram sorkar chuan Thenzawl Peace City Master plan leh Detailed Project Report (DPR) siamtu atan a ruai a ni.

title: SAITUAL DEF CHUAN HEROIN TAM THAM TAK ₹- 4.9 CRORE MAN HUN AN MAN
content:
638/2026-2027

Saitual, the 21st May, 2026 :Saitual DEF Special Team chuan heroin 2.493 kg, ₹4,98,60,000 man vel an man.

ASI H. Lalpekhlua-a, Special Team member-in enquiry report a theh luh angin C/No.51/2026 Dt.21.05.2026 U/S 21(c)/25 ND&PS Act r/w 181 MV Act chu register a ni a. Special Team chuan zan laiah Keifang khaw pawnah random checking an kalpui laiin Bolero var registration number AS11 V 6022, Manipur atanga Aizawl pana kal chu an hmu a. He motor hi kum tling lo, kum 15 mi  khalh a ni. Rinhlelhna avangin zing dar 1:30 vel khan Keifang Kualmawi, Aizawl kawngah motor hi tihdin a ni a, uluk taka check niin, Bolero chhung a hnung seat siam danglam bikah thuhruk taka dah sahbawn bawm 210 (zahnih leh sawm)-ah heroin kg 2.493, ₹4,98,60,000 man hu vel man chhuah a ni.

Naupang dan lama buaina nei (juvenile in conflict with law) chungah dan anga hma lak a ni a, a nu hnenah mobile phone hmangin hriattirna pawh pek nghal a ni bawk. An motor hmante leh Vivo mobile phone hmante chu man a ni.

He case-ah hian midang inhnamhnawih te hriat chhuah a nih theih nan investigation chu kalpui zui zel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH GYAN BHARATAM MISSION COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
637/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 21st May, 2026 :Vawiin khan District Level Committee on Gyan Bharatam Mission chu SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian meeting hmasaa thurel bawhzuinate sawiho a ni a. Mizo Lal Zataia’n Superintendent of Lushai Hills hnena a lehkhathawn te, kohhran lehkha pawimawh hlui te, Lal Kairuma thlahte thuziah te leh hmanlai atang tawha Biate khua hi khaw fai a nih zia ziahnate zawn chhuah tawh a nih thu tarlan a ni a. Pi leh pute sulhnu, lehkha emaw hnaha an kutziak tam zawk hmuhchhuah a nih theih nan hmalak zel dan tur leh Khawzawl district chhunga khaw hrang hrangte tlawh dan tur rel a ni.

Pu Chandrakant Bagoria chuan mizote thu ziak hlui zawn chhuah hna thawk tur hian Khawzawl district khaw hrang hranga khawtlang hruaitute leh sawrkar hotute nen thawh hona tha neih a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Gyan Bharatam Mission hi Ministry of Culture kaltlanga India ram pum huapa kut ziak (manuscript) kum 75 aia hluite zawn chhuah leh vawn that (digitalized) kawnga hmalakna kalmek a ni a. Kum 2025 – 2031 inkar chhunga kalpui tur a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthialah January-March 2026 quarter chhunga Bank hrang hrang hmalak tawhna thlirletin DCC/DLSC/DLRC thukhawm
content:
636/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 21st May, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Meeting Hall-ah Bawrhsap, Pi K.Vanlalruati kaihhruaiin District Consultative Committee (DCC), District Level Review Committee (DLRC) leh District Level Security Committee (DLSC) thutkhawmna neih a ni a. Annual Credit Plan, 2025-26 chu Bawrhsap hian tlangzarh nghalin Pu JD Traite, District Development Manager, NABARD chuan Hnahthial District tana ACP tlangzarh tak sawi zauna hun a hmang nghal a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian a hmasa in DCC leh DLSC hnuaia Agenda hrang hrangte rel niin a hmasa berah Bank lamin Security lamah buaina an neih leh neih loh te thlir ho a ni a, Security nei tha tawk lo te chu an controlling office-ah thlen ni se ti a rel a ni. District chhunga branch awm zat leh an dinhmunte chu thlir ho nghal niin tun dinhmunah chuan District pumah Branch panga (5) an awm thu tarlan a ni a. Public Bank ATM pakhat (1) leh Co-operative Bank ATM pakhat (1) an awm thu tarlan niin Business Correspondence hi Public leh Rural Bank-ah an vaiin sawm leh pali (14) an awm thu tarlan a ni.

Tun Quarter-ah hian Quarter hmasa aiin Ba Chhia (Non Performing Assets) chu Bank awm pathum (3) - SBI, MRB leh MCAB ah te tlem a a pun thu tarlan niin hei hi loan la an pun vang bakah ba rul reng thin, a tawp thlenga rul zo thei lo te an awm vang a nih tlangpui thu tarlan a ni.

Financial Literacy Camp chu Quarter hmasa aia neih hnem zawk niin vawi sawm leh pakua (19) neih a ni.

DLRC meeting chuan chhunzawmin CD ratio bakah Central scheme hrang hrang hnuaia loan pek chhuah leh rulh that dante thlir ho nghal a ni a. Bank-te chuan an harsatna neih hrang hrang, a bikin PMEGP leh PMJDY hnuaia an harsatna neihte an tarlang a. PMEGP hnuaiah loan hi CIBIL score chhiat vangte leh Bank kalphung zawm felfai loh vangte a pe chhuak lo an nih thu tarlan a ni a, Margin Money release a la ni lo chu an buaina pakhat a nih thu tarlan a ni. PMJDY hnuaia zero balance account hawng thar an pun theih loh chhan chu withdrawal limit a tlem vang ni a a lan thu tarlan a ni bawk.

Meeting hi Pu R. Lalmalsawma, Lead District Manager, Lead Bank Office, Lunglei chuan kaihruaiin sawrkar-a line department aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT MINERAL FOUNDATION GOVERNING COUNCIL THUKHAWM
content:
635/2026-2027

Lawngtlai 21st May 2026 :Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Mineral Foundation Governing Council - chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall - ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai District- atanga Mining-  titute  hnen atanga royalty leh fine lut thinte dik leh tangkai taka hman chu thil pawimawh tak a ni, a ti a. A bik takin Mining atanga sum hmuhte chu dik, felfai leh langtlang taka enkawl a tul hle tih sawiin, khawtlang leh  ram hmasawnna tura hman a nih tur thu a tarlang a ni. Bawrhsap chuan Lawngtlai District - chhunga  Mining kalpuite chu  dan ang thlap a hna thawk tur leh sawrkara sum an chhunluh ngai ang angte tha taka chhung lut tura chahin, heng sum tlingkhawmte hi mipuite tan tangkai taka hman a ni ang a ti bawk.

Er. Lalthankima, Asst. Controller of Mines, Directorate of Geology and Mines, chuan Power Point Presentation - pein,  District Mineral Foundation' (DMF) kalphung tlangpui sawiin,  DMF tum ber ber chu Pradhan Mantri Khanij Kshetra Kalyan Yojana (PMKKKY) kalpui a ni, a ti a . DMF hnuaia Sum lakluhna - Royalty, Fines, Sum hmanna tur - High Priority Sector, Other Priority Sector, Administrative Cost; leh DMF Fund chungchang sawifiahna a nei a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District - in DMF Fund a neih cheng 1,29,314/- hman tangkai dan tur sawihona neih a ni a. Danin a phut angin, hmanna tur felfai tak siam phawt ni se tih tiin  ruahmanna hi  DMF Governing Council - thutkhawm leh hunah siam ni se an ti a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Mineral Foundation Governing Council  Member- te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: SAITUALAH ELECTION OFFICER HOIN SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION 2026 CHUNGCHANGAH POLITICAL PARTY TE THUKHAWM
content:
634/2026-2027

Saitual, the 21st May, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah Pi Mary L. Rodinpuii, Election Officer kaihhruaiin Special Intensive Revision, 2026 Mizorama kalpui mek chungchangah Political Party te nen chiang zawka inhrilhfiahna leh hma lakna tur hrang hrangte sawi hona hun hman a ni.

He hunah Pi Mary L. Rodinpuii, EO chuan thu a sawi a, vawiin thutkhawm chu SIR chungchanga thutkhawm hmasa ber a ni tih sawiin, political party te chu SIR 2026 atan hian an pawimawh hle a ni, tih a sawi. Party hruaitute chu party hrang hrang aiawh te ni mah se tanho a tul hle a ni tih a sawi a, roll-ah mipuite thun kim an nih theih nana hma lak te, Booth Level Agent (BLA) hmalakna hriatpuite a tul a ni, a ti.

EO chuan BLA list te chu endik a, siam that ngai a awm a nih chuan Election branch lam hriattir turin party hruaitute chu a chah a, mahni awmna Whatsapp groupah te theih tawpa SIR pawimawhna te chu uar taka puangzar turin a chah bawk a ni. Pi Mary L. Rodinpuii chuan SIR 2026 hlawhtling taka neih a nih theih nan chuan tanho a tul tih a sawi a, hriat chian duh nei tan pawhin Election Branch chu an inhawn reng thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi Pi Mary L. Rodinpuii, Election Officer chuan a kai hruai a, INC, MNF leh ZPM Political Party aiawh pahnih theuh telin, Political Party te hian EVM-VVPAT Warehouse an tlawh bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Siaha-ah DLCC/DLRC thutkhawmna neih a ni
content:
633/2026-2027

Siaha, the 21st May 2026: District Level Consultative Committee, District Level Review Committee thutkhawm chu vawiin khan SDO (S) Pu Vanlalchhuanliana kaihhruaiin DRDO Conference Hall, Siaha-ah neih a ni.

Vawiin meetingah hian thutkhawm hnuhnung bera minute ngaihthlak niin pawm tlan a ni a, bank hrang hrangte hnathawh leh tih tur a tuk te thlirho a ni.

Vawiin Meeting in a tarlan danin banka pawisa dahkhawm (deposit) zat za zela bank in an pekchhuah (credit) zat chhutna credit deposit ratio chu 81.13% a ni a, quarter hnuhnung ber (96%)  tehkhinin 14.87% in a hniam a ni.

March Ni 31, 2026 thlenga bank hrang hrang in loan an pekchhuah zat tur bituk (Annual credit plan) te, KCC loan pekchhuah tur bituk an siamte, Self Help Group te tana loan pekchhuah zat te, PMEGP leh NULM hnuaia loan pekchhuah dan te leh loan hrang hrang pekchhuah dan dinhmun thlirho a ni. Mipui nawlpuiin bank leh a kaihhnawiha hriattur tul leh pawimawh an hriatchian lehzual nan zirtirna (Financial Literacy Campaign) buatsaih nasat a tul thu bakah bank branch hrang hrangah venhimna uluk zawk kalpui a tul thu te tarlan a ni.

Pawisa dah hmasa lova account hawn theih na (Zero balance) Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana leh social security scheme hrang hrang - PMSBY, PMJJBY leh APY a Siaha bank te dinhmun leh hmasawn dan tur chungchangte sawiho nghal niin  2026-27 chhunga hman tur Annual Credit Plan thlirho nghal a ni.

Siaha District chhungah tun dinhmunah Bank branch 8 a awm mek a, SBI-1, MCAB-2, IDBI-1, HDFC-1 leh MRB-3 a awm mek a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lead District Manager Pu JM Soren bakah NABARD aiawhte, RBI aiawhte, Bank branch hrang hrang aiawhte leh department official te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: GAD OFFICE MEMORANDUM CHHUAK BAWHZUIIN LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN THUTKHAWM NEI
content:
632/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 21st May 2026 :General Administration Department (GAD) Government of Mizoramin 'Economy and Fuel Conservation Measures' a tihchhuah tak bawhzawiin vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kahhruaiin DC Conference Hall - ah Heads of Department - ten thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. West Asia buaina avangin khawvelin tuialhtheiah harsatna a tawk mek tih sawiin, heihian nghawng a nei lian hle a ni, a ti. Economy and Fuel Conservation Measures - chungchanga Prime Minister - in ngenna a siam bawhzuia GAD- ten Office Memorandum - a tihchhuah chu Lawngtlai District-ah pawh a theih chin chinah kalpui a tul hle a ti a. A bik takin tuialhthei leh kawlphetha renchem kawngah department hotute mawhphurhna la ngam tur leh inrenchem thar turin a chah a. Office Memorandum- in a sawi ang a Public Transport - hman tangkai thiam te, Video Conference kaltlanga Meeting neih te, tul loa District pawn lamah zin leh a dangte theih chin china zawk turin Heads of Department - te a chah nghal bawk a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian GAD in Office Memorandum- a tihchhuah chu uluk taka sawiho a ni a. Kawlphetha renchem kawngah mahni Office - ah theuh bawhzui ni se, Nilai Ni ah ' No Official Vehicle Day ' kenkawh ni se,  tul leh pawimawh a awm a nih loh chuan District - pawn lamah leh State pawnah te  zinchhuah lo hram ni se an ti a. Office staff atanga zaa sawmhnih ten in lam atanga hnathawh tur tih chu mahni department remchan dan anga kalpui ni se tiin GAD Office Memorandum- chu a theih ang anga zawm ni se an ti bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Heads of Department - te an telkim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: UD&PA MINISTER-I’N HLIMEN FOOTBALL KHELMUAL (PLAYGROUND) HAWNG
content:
631/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 21st May, 2026 :Vawiin khan UD&PA minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Hlimen ah Aizawl Smart City Limited hnuaia sak Hlimen Football khelmual (Playground) a hawng a, he khelmual hi ₹ 10.65 crore seng a sak a ni.

Hawnna inkhawmah hian khuallian Pu K. Sapdanga chuan thu sawiin, India ram pumpuiah mizote chu football khel thiama hriat kan ni a, ISL leh I-league ah te pawh player chhuanawm tak tak kan nei chu ṭha a tih thu a sawi a, he kan hmingthatna hi chhawm nun a nih zel theihna turin khelmual hawn thar pawh hian kawng ro tam tak a sut kuak ngei a beisei thu sawiin, field nuam satliah lo, ṭhalai tam tak football lam a mi chhuanawm chher chhuaktu a lo nih a, hriselna kawngahte, mahni invawnna kawngahte Hlimen khawtlang tan pawh malsawma thlen theitu a nih ngei a beisei thu a tarlang bawk a ni. Local Council hruaitute pawh neitu nihna pek an nih angin a hlutna hria a, uluk taka enkawl zui turin a chah a, zan lam thleng pawha inkhelh theihna tur field an nei thei ta chu hmasawnna ropui tak Mizoram tan pawh a nih thu a sawi tel bawk a ni.

Bialtu MLA Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi pawhin thu sawiin, Hlimen khawtlang tan ni chhinchhiah tlak tak a nih thu leh, khelmual hawn thar chu ṭhalaite tan eizawnna ngialnghet siam saktu a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Pu CC. Lalchhuangkima, Chief Exexutive Officer, Aizawl Smart City Limited hnen aṭangin technical report ngaihthlak a ni a. Khelmual sak thar hi Lalhming Infrastructure and Construction Pvt Ltd. te sak niin, ₹10.65 crore senga sak zawh a ni a, 25th April, 2022 atanga bul tan niin, 28th February, 2026 a sak zawh a ni a, khelmual zau zawng hi a dung 100 metre ni in, a vang lam hi 50 metre a ni a, mi 696 tan thutna a awm bawk a ni. Khelmual hmang duh tan darkar khatah Rs 1200 in a book theih a, Nikhat (Daily) ah - Rs 7000 niin, zan lama hmang duh te tan darkar khatah Rs 2500 chawi in a hman theih bawk a ni. Pu Chhuangkima hian Hlimen Veng Local Council hruaitu te hnenah neitu nihna leh a enkawltu nihna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Khelmual hawnna inkhawm hi Pu RC. Lalroliana, Chairman, Field Mangement Committee chuan lawmthu sawina in a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL WILDLIFE DIVISION HMALAKNAIN AR NOTE SEM CHHUAH A NI
content:
630/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 20th May, 2026 :Nimin khan Khawzawl Wildlife Division hmalaknain kumin chhunga a tawpna ber atan Ngopa leh Lamzawl khuaah te Centrally Sponsored Scheme- Integrated Development of Wildlife Habitat (IDWH) hnuaia Eco-development activity pakhat atan Rainbow rooster ar note 2000 sem chhuah leh a ni.

He scheme kaltlang hian kumin chhungin ar note hi tum li (4) sem chhuah tawh a ni a. Murlen National Park leh Lengteng Wildlife Sanctuary chhehvela khaw 13-a cheng chhungkaw zathum (300) hnenah ar note 15,000 sem chhuah tawh a ni. Ar note semna hmunahte hian Khawzawl Wildlife Division, Divisional Forest Officer Pu Lalnunthanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah thuchah sawiin, Lengteng Wildlife Sanctuary bulhnai khaw awmte chu Sanctuary neitu tak takte an nih avangin theihtawp chhuaha ramngaw leh nungcha humhalh kawngah sawrkar thawhpui turin a sawm a. Ramngaw leh nungcha chereu zel tur venhim chu khua leh tui tha kan nih theihna leh India ram Danpui hnuaia kan mawhphurhna pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi.
